title: `Arad #6166
definition:
Arad = "a wild ass"

 n pr m
 1) a Benjamite, son of Beriah, who drove out the inhabitants of Gath

 n pr loc
 2) a royal city of the Canaanites north of the wilderness of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Arad = "a wild ass"

 n pr m
 1) a Benjamite, son of Beriah, who drove out the inhabitants of Gath

 n pr loc
 2) a royal city of the Canaanites north of the wilderness of Judah

    NASB:  a Canaanite city in the Negev
